title: PipeShare explorer column sort + filter (dbg130)
description:
The PipeShare file explorer table now behaves more like Windows Explorer. Type, Size, and Modified column headers show sort arrows — click to toggle ascending or descending. Click the column label text to open a dark filter menu with sort options and (for Type) checkbox filters for Folder, PDF, WinCan DB3, and other file types.

Sort preferences persist for the browser session. The feature lives in the modular file-explorer addon, not in the monolithic host app.

Who is affected: OVH private server on deploy. SaaS when Mike applies the platform version in releases.html.
changeLog: Windows-style sort arrows on Type, Size, Modified columns.
Click column label opens filter popover with sort + type checkboxes.
Type filter supports Folder, PDF, Video, WinCan DB3, File, Jobsite.
